items.title: Fix environment variable handling to prevent merge conflicts in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves an issue with the environment variable configuration in the deployment YAML. By reverting to plain value fields for specific variables, we ensure compatibility with the existing deployment and prevent API server validation errors. The changes streamline the integration with Tencent SSM for runtime value injection.

items.title: Update MCP Suno Repo URL in Suno Cli 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the README.md file to reflect the new GitHub URL for the MCP Suno repository, changing it from MCPSuno to SunoMCP. This ensures users have the correct link for accessing the MCP server version. The change enhances clarity and maintains up-to-date documentation.

items.title: Sync and Clean Up Skills in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves issues with stale deployed copies in the `.github/skills` and `.agents/skills` directories, ensuring they are now in sync with the canonical `skills/` files. It also removes nested directory artifacts caused by a bug in the sync workflow, enhancing the overall organization and efficiency of the project. Key changes include the implementation of a cleanup step in the sync process to prevent future issues.

items.title: Fix deployment issues with x402 env vars in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves deployment failures caused by incorrect `secretKeyRef` configurations for the X402 environment variables. By switching to plain empty string defaults, we ensure that the correct values are filled at pod startup, allowing for successful deployments. This fix is crucial as it unblocks all deployments that were stalled after the x402 merge.

items.title: Enhance video commands with new parameters in Veo Cli 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces three new parameters to the CLI: `resolution`, `translation`, and the mandatory `action` field. Users can now specify output resolutions like `4k`, `1080p`, and `gif`, as well as enable or disable translation for video generation commands. The README has been updated to reflect these changes, and tests have been added to ensure functionality.

items.title: Updated GitHub URL in Veo M C P 🚀
items.summary: The GitHub URL in the JetBrains plugin Kotlin source has been updated from `MCPVeo` to `VeoMCP`. This change ensures that users are directed to the correct repository for the source code. It enhances the accuracy of the documentation and improves user experience.

items.title: Standardize Repository References in Luma M C P 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the repository name references from the old `MCPXxx` convention to the new `XxxMCP` format. Key changes include updates to the README, CHANGELOG, and configuration files to reflect the new repository name, ensuring consistency across documentation and links. No API specifications were altered in this update.

items.title: Standardize Naming Conventions in Seedance M C P 🚀
items.summary: This update aligns the naming conventions across the Seedance MCP project by changing references from `MCPXxx` to `XxxMCP`. Key modifications include updates to the README, main module documentation, and various core files to reflect the new naming. These changes enhance clarity and consistency throughout the project.

items.title: Updated MCP Repo Name References in Luma Cli 🚀
items.summary: This update syncs the README to reflect the new naming convention for MCP repositories, changing references from `MCPXxx` to `XxxMCP`. The comparison section and table column in the README have been updated accordingly. All related endpoints and request parameters remain verified and consistent with the current OpenAPI spec.

items.title: Fix routing for image2video in Platform Service 🎥
items.summary: This update corrects the routing for the image2video action to the appropriate upstream endpoint, ensuring that head and tail frame images are respected during video generation. The changes also include tracking the effective upstream action for accurate polling endpoint routing and handling edge cases where text2video requests include start images. Overall, this enhances the functionality and reliability of the Kling Videos Generation API.

items.title: Update MCP Naming in Sora Cli 🚀
items.summary: This update reflects the renaming of the MCP product from 'MCP Sora' to 'Sora MCP' in the documentation. The README.md has been modified to ensure consistency with the new naming conventions, with no changes to endpoints, parameters, or models. The OpenAPI spec remains fully in sync with the CLI.

items.title: Fix parameter names in SunoCli for API compliance in Suno Cli 🎶
items.summary: This update corrects the parameter names for the `mashup-lyrics` command to align with the OpenAPI specification. The fields `lyric_a` and `lyric_b` have been changed to `lyrics_a` and `lyrics_b`, ensuring that the API processes requests correctly. All other endpoints and models are already in sync with the latest spec.

items.title: Sync with Docs complete in Flux M C P 🚀
items.summary: This update aligns the repository with recent changes in the documentation, specifically the renaming of downstream references from `MCPFlux` to `FluxMCP`. All verification checks have passed, confirming that the model enums, endpoints, request parameters, and test suite are fully compliant with the updated specifications.

items.title: Update GitHub URL references for SoraMCP in Sora M C P 🚀
items.summary: This update standardizes the GitHub repository URL references from `mcp-sora` to `SoraMCP` in both `pyproject.toml` and `README.md`. Key changes include updated links for the homepage, repository, issues, and changelog. The PyPI package name and other identifiers remain unchanged, ensuring continuity for users.

The PyPI package name remains unchanged, ensuring consistency across platforms.

items.title: Update MCP References for Clarity in Seedream Cli 🚀

The install command has also been updated to match the actual PyPI package name, ensuring users have the correct information. These changes enhance clarity and usability for developers interacting with the Seedream CLI.

items.title: Update default model to chirp-v5-5 and fix model naming in Suno M C P 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the default model to `chirp-v5-5`, enhancing the quality of audio generation. Key changes include updates to configuration files, README documentation, and test assertions to reflect the new model. The model name for `chirp-v3` has also been corrected to `chirp-v3-0` for consistency with the specification.

items.title: Sync with Latest API Specification in Veo M C P 🚀
items.summary: This PR aims to synchronize the VeoMCP repository with the latest updates from the upstream Docs API specification. Key changes include updates to model references and the addition of new features related to downstream repositories. The goal is to ensure that all models, endpoints, and parameters are accurately reflected in the codebase.

The goal is to ensure that the Seedance CLI remains aligned with the most current API specifications.

Key changes include updates in documentation and code files, ensuring consistency with the recent GitHub repository renames. This will enhance clarity and maintainability in the project.

items.title: Mobile Download Entry Restored in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update restores the mobile download page and route that were accidentally reverted. Key changes include exposing the Android APK download entry in the header, footer, and user menu, along with fixing the Android GitHub Actions workflow for native plugin files. The changes enhance user accessibility to mobile downloads and improve the overall functionality of the app.

items.title: Optimize CI for Non-Service Changes in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the CI workflow to only trigger the `docker-compose build` for top-level directories containing a Compose file. It prevents failures in the build job caused by changes in non-service paths like `.github`. The change is limited to the existing `check-pr` workflow, ensuring a smoother CI process.

items.title: Updated scaffold to version 0.9.0 in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the acedatacloud-scaffold to version 0.9.0 across all PlatformService workers that depend on it. Additionally, Poetry lockfiles have been refreshed for all affected workers, and the exported requirements.txt files for the openai and aichat workers have been updated accordingly. These changes ensure that the latest features and fixes from the scaffold are available to the workers.

items.title: Automate PyPI Publishing with CalVer in Scaffold Python 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new GitHub Actions workflow that automates the publishing of packages to PyPI upon merging to the main branch. It utilizes CalVer versioning to ensure unique versioning based on the date and build counter, and includes concurrency control to prevent duplicate publishes. Additionally, it creates GitHub Releases with distribution artifacts for better version management.

items.title: Update Tencent Cloud SDK to Latest Version in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the `tencentcloud-sdk-python` package from version 3.1.57 to 3.1.61. Key changes include improvements and bug fixes from the latest releases, enhancing the functionality and stability of the SDK. The modifications were made in both `poetry.lock` and `pyproject.toml` files.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Worker with Duration Tracking in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the `started_at` and `payflow` fields to the OpenAI worker, aligning its functionality with the TypeScript workers. The changes enable better API duration tracking and support for x402 payment flows. Key modifications ensure that these fields are correctly forwarded from query parameters, enhancing overall performance and consistency.

items.title: Enhance payflow parameter handling in Scaffold Python 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the forwarding of the `payflow` query parameter from the Kong-injected query string to the `/record` endpoint payload. This enhancement allows the PlatformGateway to effectively identify x402 payment requests, improving the overall functionality of the system. Key modifications were made in the base handler to accommodate this new feature.

items.title: Enhance Payment Flow Handling in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update forwards the `payflow` query parameter from Kong to the Gateway's `/record` endpoint, allowing for better identification of x402 payment requests during billing. Key changes include updates to 13 TypeScript workers and one Python worker to extract and include the `payflow` field in the POST payload. This enhancement ensures that balance deductions are skipped for x402-settled requests, improving the payment processing workflow.

items.title: Exciting x402 HTTP Micropayment Support for OOBE Synapse Agents in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates the x402 HTTP micropayment protocol into PlatformGateway, allowing OOBE Synapse agents to make API payments using USDC without Bearer tokens. Key changes include the introduction of a feature flag for enabling the x402 flow, modifications to the Gateway Auth and record methods, and new utility functions for payment processing. The existing Bearer token flow remains unchanged, ensuring a smooth transition for users.

items.title: Enhance API Usage Timing Fields in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the ability to accept and persist timing fields such as started_at, finished_at, and duration in the gateway record pipeline. The ApiUsage model has been extended to include these fields, ensuring that timing data is accurately recorded when API usage is created or updated. The changes improve the tracking and analysis of API performance.

items.title: Enhance API Usage Tracking in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new indexed fields for tracking API usage timing, including 'started_at', 'finished_at', and 'duration'. These fields have been added to the ApiUsage model and exposed through the ApiUsage serializer. The migration has been applied locally to ensure smooth integration.

items.title: Exciting New API Actions and Parameters Added in Suno Cli 🚀
items.summary: This update syncs the Suno CLI with the latest AceDataCloud/Docs OpenAPI spec, introducing 5 new commands and enhancing 7 existing ones with additional parameters. New commands include `generate-persona-vox`, `all-stems`, `underpainting`, `overpainting`, and `samples`, each designed to expand the creative capabilities of users. The updates improve functionality and provide more options for audio manipulation, enhancing the overall user experience.

items.title: Enhance CI Workflow to Block Failures in Platform Service 🚫
items.summary: This update removes the `|| true` fallbacks from lint and prettier checks in the CI workflow, ensuring that any failures will block pull requests. Additionally, the fallback has been removed from the docker-compose build process, enhancing the reliability of the build jobs. These changes are scoped to the existing `check-pr` workflow, allowing current required checks to function correctly.

items.title: Enhance API Timing Propagation in Platform Service ⏱️
items.summary: This update introduces the propagation of timing fields such as started_at, finished_at, and duration across the PlatformService worker usage records. These timing values are now persisted into task state before posting usage records to the gateway, ensuring that final timing values are included in worker success payloads for updated handlers. This enhancement improves tracking and performance analysis of API usage.

items.title: Enhance Suno Music Skill with Latest Model and Actions in Skills 🎶
items.summary: This update syncs the Suno Music skill documentation with the latest OpenAPI spec, introducing the chirp-v5-5 model and expanding the action enum. Key changes include updated examples, a bug fix for custom generation, and a comprehensive table of available actions. Additionally, a note on the variation_category parameter has been added to clarify its usage in version 5 and above.

items.title: Update Suno Music Model to Chirp-v5-5 in Skills 🎶
items.summary: The default model for the Suno Music skill has been updated from `chirp-v4-5` to `chirp-v5-5` in the documentation. Key examples in the Quick Start and Core Workflow sections have been modified to reflect this change. All other skills have been verified against the latest OpenAPI specs, confirming no additional updates are necessary.

items.title: Translation sync completed in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the zh-CN translations with the latest upstream Docs commit. No API changes were introduced, ensuring that all existing models and endpoints remain intact. The verification process confirmed that all tests are passing, maintaining the stability of the project.

items.title: Update wcnb Domain and Enhance Logging in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update switches the wcnb upstream domain from `wcnb.ai` to `wcnbai.com` and updates the associated secret keys for nano, veo, and checker. Additionally, it introduces masked logging for wcnb API calls to improve production debugging. These changes aim to enhance security and streamline operations.

items.title: Sync CLI with OpenAPI Spec and Enhance Parameters in Seedream Cli 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes the `edit` command payload by renaming `image_urls` to `image` and removing the hardcoded action parameter. Additionally, new parameters have been added for both `generate` and `edit` commands, enhancing functionality and user experience. The changes ensure better alignment with the OpenAPI specification.

items.title: Enhance video commands with `--timeout` option in Luma Cli 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a `--timeout` parameter for the video commands in the Luma CLI, allowing users to specify a server-side data-return timeout. The new option has been integrated into the `generate`, `image-to-video`, and `extend` commands, with corresponding tests added to ensure functionality. Documentation has also been updated to reflect this new feature.

items.title: SeedanceCli verified against latest Docs spec in Seedance Cli 🚀
items.summary: This sync confirmed that the SeedanceCli repository is fully aligned with the current `openapi/seedance.json` specification. All models and parameters were verified, and no code changes were necessary as the spec remained unchanged. The repository is now fully in sync with the latest documentation.

items.title: MCPLuma is in sync with OpenAPI specs in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update confirms that MCPLuma is fully aligned with the specifications outlined in openapi/luma.json. The verification process showed no required changes, as all endpoints, parameters, and types are already consistent. Key functionalities such as video generation and task management are well-covered across the tool signatures.

items.title: Update model identifiers in README for accuracy in M C P Seedance 🚀
items.summary: The README model table has been updated to reflect the correct model identifiers, aligning with `core/types.py` and the upstream OpenAPI spec. Four model names were corrected to ensure consistency and accuracy, enhancing the documentation's reliability for users. This change eliminates any discrepancies between the README and the actual model identifiers.

items.title: Sync verification complete for SERP repo in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: The SERP repository has been verified to be in sync with the latest `openapi/serp.json`. Key elements such as endpoints and parameters were compared and confirmed to be correctly mapped with no required changes. This ensures that the integration remains functional and up-to-date.

items.title: Enhance Midjourney MCP Icon Metadata in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update adds explicit icon metadata to the hosted Midjourney server card and standardizes the server.json icons and title metadata for registry consumers. Additionally, the website URL has been updated to point directly to the GitHub repository instead of the generic AceDataCloud platform brand. These changes improve the clarity and usability of the MCP Midjourney integration.
